title: Parameter of an array of enumeration values breaks conditionals inside a generate block

features.name: parameter of unpacked array of enum values
features.description: Code should include a parameter declared as an unpacked array of enumeration values used in generate conditions
features.snippet:
typedef enum {VAL0, VAL1} my_e;
parameter my_e arr[2] = '{VAL0, VAL1};

features.name: enum array parameter in generate if condition
features.description: Code should include a generate if block where the condition uses a parameter that is an unpacked array of enumeration values
features.snippet:
generate
  if (arr[0] == VAL0) begin : gen_block
    // logic
  end
endgenerate

features.name: enum array parameter in generate case condition
features.description: Code should include a generate case block where the condition uses a parameter that is an unpacked array of enumeration values
features.snippet:
generate
  case (arr[0])
    VAL0: begin : gen_val0 end
    VAL1: begin : gen_val1 end
  endcase
endgenerate
